author: sleepyhauru
description: Steals emojis and stickers sent by other people and optionally uploads them to your own server. Supports context menu commands. Can also upload stickers from mobile.
install_msg: Load it with `[p]load emojisteal`. Use `[p]steal` on a reply, `[p]steal upload` to import the replied-to emoji or sticker, and `[p]getemoji` for direct asset links. To enable the message context commands, run `[p]slash enablecog emojisteal` and `[p]slash sync`.
short: Steal emojis and stickers from replied-to messages.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any user data.
